bead.title: benchmark workbench: add automated browser smoke
bead.description: Add a checked-in browser smoke/regression command for the benchmark workbench so FEAT-008 acceptance is not only manually verified. It should load the static Hugo explorer, wait for DuckDB/Perspective to initialize, assert the row count, model filters, pairwise comparison, task links, and absence of terminalbench_task_url from default visible columns.
bead.acceptance: A repository command or script runs the benchmark workbench smoke test; CI/local docs name the command; assertions cover row load, model picker, enum filters, pairwise gap table, task links, and no default terminalbench_task_url column.
